back_translation: Now the Spirit has spoken clearly that, in the last age, some will abandon the faith, turning to pay attention to deceiving spirits and the teachings of demonic-spirits
Through the pretense of those who speak falsely, whose own conscience has been branded with hot iron
They forbid marriage, and require abstaining from certain foods — foods that God has created so that those who believe and know the truth might eat with thanksgiving
Because everything that God has created is good, and nothing should be rejected if received with thanksgiving
Because that food is sanctified by the word of God and prayer
If you point out these things to the brothers, you will be a good servant of Jesus Christ, one who has been nourished by the words of faith and the correct teaching that you have held to
But reject stories that profane sacred things and trivial-tales like those old women tell. Train yourself in godly-reverence
For physical training has only a small benefit, but godly-reverence has benefit in every way, having a divine-promise both for the present life and for the life to come
This saying is trustworthy and worthy of full acceptance
For this very reason we work hard and devote ourselves fully, because we have placed our trust in the living God, who is the Savior of all people, especially of those who believe
Do not let anyone despise your youth, but be an example for the believers in speech, in conduct, in love, in faith, in purity
Until I come, devote yourself to the reading of Scripture in the assembly, to encouragement, and to teaching
Do not neglect the gift that is in you, which was received through prophecy together with the laying on of hands by the council of elders
Pay attention to these things, devote yourself to them, so that your progress will be evident to all
Watch over yourself and your teaching closely. Persevere in these things, because in doing so, you will save both yourself and those who hear you
